title: Sees Beyond
summary: You have a psychic sense that allows you to see what others cannot.
tiers: Tier 3: Find the Hidden or Sensor
Tier 6: Mental Projection or Total Awareness
Tier 3: Roaming Third Eye or Find the Hidden
Tier 6: Mental Projection or Improved Sensor
gm_intrusions: Reuniting mind and body can sometimes be disorienting and require a character to spend a few moments to get their bearings.
text: You have a psychic sense that allows you to see what others cannot. Separates Mind From Body You can project your mind out of your body to see faraway places and learn secrets that would otherwise remain hidden.
details: You have a psychic sense that allows you to see what others cannot.
Separates Mind From Body You can project your mind out of your body to see faraway places and learn secrets that would otherwise remain hidden.
